purpose: Declares PreviewWindow, the Win32 child window that Notepad++ docks as the Markdown++ preview pane and that hosts the WebViewHost. Forwards lifecycle, scroll, link, print and PDF-export calls into the embedded WebViewHost.
exports: PreviewWindow::SetDocument(document, articleHtml, title, documentRoot, initialSourceLine, initialScrollRatio, initialAnchorRatio, mermaidEnabled)
invariants: Non-copyable; owns the underlying HWND and WebViewHost. Destroy() / dtor must run on the UI thread that created the window.
Create() must be called before any Show/Hide/SetDocument; subsequent Create calls after a successful one short-circuit.
The CloseCallback is invoked when Notepad++ sends DMN_CLOSE through WM_NOTIFY (the dockable-window close button).
